title.en: Ye Tian came to Wu Xuan and said respectfully.

content.en:
Ye Tian knew the dangers of the gray fog area, so he would not go deep into it, so that even if he encountered danger, he could withdraw in time.

As time passed, Ye Tian's strength was also improving, and the ultimate palace rules were also improving rapidly. This was all with the help of his true body, otherwise he could not improve so quickly.

Now, the connection between him and his true body across the time and space line is delayed by at most half an hour.

Another period of time passed, and Ye Tian's ultimate palace rules were very close to the 365th level. Once he broke through to this level, he could try to comprehend the eternal ultimate palace rules.

This day.

Ye Tian completely comprehended the ultimate palace rules of the 365th level, and his own strength also skyrocketed.

Afterwards, he came to the Pavilion Master Wu Xuan, wanting to know how to comprehend the eternal ultimate palace rules as quickly as possible.

"Pavilion Master!"

Ye Tian came to Wu Xuan and said respectfully.

"Ye Tian, ​​what's the matter?" Wu Xuan asked.

Then, Ye Tian said that he wanted to comprehend the rules of the eternal ultimate palace, and by the way, he said that he had comprehended the rules of the ultimate palace to the 365th level.

"What, you have already comprehended the 365th level of the ultimate palace rules?"

Wu Xuan was also shocked. How long has Ye Tian been practicing? How could he break through so quickly? This broke his cognition!

But when Ye Tian showed the 365th level of the ultimate palace rules, they had to believe it.

"Ye Tian, ​​it is very difficult to comprehend the rules of the eternal ultimate palace. In the long years of Wu Pavilion, only three people have done it. If you want to quickly comprehend the rules of the eternal ultimate palace, there are ways. Follow me!"

Wu Xuan brought Ye Tian to the depths of Wu Pavilion, where there was a broken black pillar.

"This is a pillar from the depths of the gray fog area. By comprehending it, you may be able to comprehend the rules of the Eternal Ultimate Palace, but this thing is very strange. If you keep comprehending it, you will have problems with your will over time, and you may even be transformed into a fog beast. Of course, if there is a problem, give up comprehending it immediately, and after a long period of recuperation, you can come here to comprehend it again~." Wu Xuan said.

"Thank you, Pavilion Master!"

Ye Tian thanked.

Soon, Wu Xuan left.

This is not a particularly important place. Any Ultimate Palace Master who wants to comprehend the rules of the Eternal Ultimate Palace can come here to comprehend and practice.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian found that the closer he was to the black incomplete pillar, the greater the impact, but the better the comprehending effect.

"This pillar is not simple. In my time and space line, there are only a handful of treasures comparable to this pillar. Perhaps only the ultimate treasure of the time and space level can surpass it!"

Ye Tian did not let this body get close to this black broken pillar. If he continued to practice close to it, this body might be transformed into a fog beast.

So, he prepared to condenseCopy the talent ball.

He had long understood the mystery of the copy talent ball, and could condense it again in the clone of this time and space line. He didn't do it before because he was not strong enough and didn't understand the ultimate palace rules of this world. Now he has met the requirements.

He planned to use the ultimate palace rules as the basic power to condense the copy talent ball.

Then, he did it.

Gradually, the copy talent ball condensed in his mind, and he completely possessed the highest level of copy talent, and then condensed the copy body.

After that, he used the copy body to approach the black pillar and comprehend the eternal ultimate palace rules.

He approached step by step, and soon stuck to the side of the black pillar, feeling a strange force trying to influence him.

He touched the black pillar with both hands, and felt that there was another space inside the black pillar. He immediately moved and entered the inner space of the black pillar.

Inner space

Ye Tian's duplicate body entered here and began to comprehend the rules of the eternal ultimate palace. At the same time, he also found that his duplicate body was corroded.

However, he didn't care about his duplicate body being corroded at all.

Comprehend!

Comprehend!

Continue to comprehend!

The effect of this comprehension far exceeded the outer periphery of the black pillar by hundreds or even thousands of times. If he comprehended here, it wouldn't take long for him to comprehend the rules of the eternal ultimate palace.

Of course, one of his duplicate bodies couldn't last long and would be transformed into a fog beast.

"Annihilation!"

Ye Tian dissolved this duplicate body, then re-condensed the duplicate body, and continued to enter the inside of the incomplete black pillar to comprehend the rules of the eternal ultimate palace!

In this way, as time passed, Ye Tian's duplicate bodies were consumed one by one. With the help of this incomplete black pillar, he gradually comprehended the rules of the eternal ultimate palace.

At this point, he only needs to improve his cultivation to the ultimate palace master, and then he can break through to the realm of the eternal ultimate palace master!

"Continue to comprehend the eternal ultimate palace rules. In terms of improving the eternal ultimate palace rules, no treasure in my time and space line can compare to it!"

Ye Tian cherishes this opportunity very much, and naturally has to comprehend for a longer period of time until this black and broken black column is completely useless to him.

In the long years that followed, he sacrificed his duplicate body again and again to comprehend the eternal ultimate palace rules, and his grasp of the eternal ultimate palace rules became deeper and deeper.

On the other hand, the real body is also practicing and improving. Although it is difficult to make progress, at least it can continue to make progress slowly. At the same time, it is also trying to merge the paths of the two time and space lines.

He feels that when the paths of the two time and space lines are completely merged, it may be the day when he breaks through to become the ultimate supreme of the time and space level.

After a long time, Ye Tian's clone's cultivation reached the limit of the Ultimate Palace Master, and he was ready to break through and become the Eternal Ultimate Palace Master.

In addition, he alsoDao Blood Armor, Extreme Blood Blade, and Extreme Blood Escape have all been perfected to the level of the Eternal Ultimate Palace Secret Method, which also made his own strength soar to an extremely high level.

This day.

He successfully broke through to the Eternal Ultimate Palace Master realm and became the fourth Eternal Ultimate Palace Master of Wu Pavilion. Yang Yuan and other Ultimate Palace Masters were shocked and stunned. They never expected (promised) that Ye Tian was a new Ultimate Palace Master of Wu Pavilion, but now he has quickly broken through to the Eternal Ultimate Palace Master.

This strength improvement is too great and beyond their imagination!

After breaking through to become the Eternal Ultimate Palace Master, Ye Tian continued to comprehend the Eternal Ultimate Palace Rules on the black incomplete pillar, and the realm of the Eternal Ultimate Palace Rules was getting higher and higher.

But he gradually found that this incomplete black pillar was not very helpful to him. Although it was still useful, the effect was reduced several times.

If he continues to comprehend, he can definitely continue to break through the rules of the Eternal Ultimate Palace, but his time is limited. The time and space line he is in is not too far away from the final catastrophe. He must break through as soon as possible to save his family and tribe, and even the creatures of the entire time and space line.

So, he must break through as soon as possible, and then he must get a better opportunity.

"｀We must go deep into the gray fog area!"
